item.title: Bitcoin Hits New All-Time High Above $100K
item.description: Bitcoin has surged past $100,000 for the first time, driven by institutional demand and spot ETF inflows.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation Announces Major Protocol Upgrade
item.description: The Ethereum Foundation has announced a significant protocol upgrade that will improve scalability and reduce gas fees by up to 90%.

item.title: BlackRock Expands Tokenisation Platform
item.description: BlackRock is expanding its tokenisation platform to include real-world assets, bringing digital asset security to traditional finance.

item.title: Federal Reserve Signals Rate Cut
item.description: The Federal Reserve has signaled a potential rate cut at its next meeting, citing slowing inflation and labor market cooling.
